nodes.name: Canvas UI
nodes.summary: React Flow + dagre; shape+color per maturity (4 levels); styled connection lines per type (5 types); auto-layout on first open then user-owned; overlay div DOM structure

nodes.name: Node Interaction
nodes.summary: Click tooltip + right-click select; context-aware toolbar (5 skills); Status/Finalize app-native; TerminalModal React component owned here, cli-engine owns lifecycle, Zustand bridges

nodes.name: File-State Sync
nodes.summary: @parcel/watcher + 300ms debounce; full re-read on change; one-directional read-only; watcher lifecycle tied to project open/switch; pushes ProjectState via IPC

nodes.name: CLI Engine
nodes.summary: 5-state lifecycle (idle/spawning/active/exited/closing); spawn accepts string[]; terminal stays open after exit; always-visible kill; modal UI moved to renderer; health check on startup

nodes.name: Skill Orchestration
nodes.summary: Pure composeCommand returning string[] → node-pty directly (no shell); --append-system-prompt-file for SKILL.md; path resolved at startup; fully cross-platform

nodes.name: Cross-Platform Shell
nodes.summary: Electron + TS + React + Vite + Vitest; terminal-as-modal: xterm.js overlay div in main window, node-pty in main process, data via IPC; no separate BrowserWindow

nodes.name: Data Layer
nodes.summary: Read-only .ai-arch/ parser; string splitting with explicit Claude-controlled-format precondition; layout in Electron userData; outputs ProjectState; free terminal button

nodes.name: Project Launcher
nodes.summary: Two-layer: launch gate + side panel; single Open button routes via .ai-arch/ check; recents max 5 in main process; init-without-completion safe fallback; switch via switchProject with terminal guard

nodes.name: Electron IPC
nodes.summary: Two-pattern IPC: invoke for Result<T,E> request-response, send for streaming/push; 5 namespaces; ArrayBuffer transfer; main owns parsing, pushes ProjectState; Unsubscribe pattern; TerminalId future-proofing

nodes.name: State Management
nodes.summary: Zustand one-store + 3 slices; React Flow owns layout; diff hook reconciles; positive whitelist guard on switchProject (safe default: new states blocked); auto-dismiss on exited

nodes.name: Build & Distribution
nodes.summary: electron-builder; NSIS/DMG-universal/AppImage+deb; SKILL.md via extraResources only (updating skills = new release); GitHub Actions matrix CI; no auto-update or code signing for v1

nodes.name: Testing Strategy
nodes.summary: Unit+integration heavy, E2E surgical (3 scenarios); 8 diff hook cases; 5-state + whitelist guard unit tests; 2-path terminal integration; Vitest + Playwright; mocking boundaries defined

connections.note: parallel systems: cli-engine runs terminal, file-state-sync detects what Claude did
selection panel swaps with project panel
reads node/connection data and layout from store
IPC is the transport, store is the destination
SKILL.md files bundled at build time
integration tests with real fs events
data-layer output shape IS the ProjectState type that IPC transports
switchProject is the entry point for project switching
project.open, project.switch, dialog.openFolder are IPC channels
terminal lifecycle integration tests (happy path + kill + error)
unit tests for command composition (4 patterns)
unit tests for store actions, switchProject guard, diff hook

sessions.summary: Initial brainstorm — 9 nodes created

Decided Electron + TS + React + Vite stack; discovered terminal-as-modal pattern with xterm.js + node-pty; reshaped cli-engine, skill-orchestration, file-state-sync, node-interaction, multi-node-context

Defined terminal lifecycle: startup health check, single terminal, fixed modal with fullscreen toggle, close disabled while active; refined node interaction to tooltip+skill buttons; multi-node to right-click select+panel
Strictly read-only — no writes to .ai-arch/; simple string splitting for MD parsing; layout in Electron userData; free terminal button for general Claude sessions
Two-layer design: startup gate popup + persistent right-side panel on canvas; single Open button routes existing/new; new project flow with optional form fields; click recents to switch instantly
React Flow for rendering; maturity as shape+color (gray circle → gold badge); connection lines styled+colored per type; auto-layout on first open then user-owned; name-only nodes
Added top toolbar with all 5 skills; Status/Finalize are app-rendered panels from index.json; tooltip shows Explore/Decide/Map; click outside to dismiss
Selection panel replaces project panel; shows names + Clear button only; top toolbar context-aware — picks up selected nodes as args; no duplicate skill buttons
@parcel/watcher for native cross-platform fs watching; debounce 200-300ms; re-read entire folder; one-directional read-only, simpler than expected
SKILL.md bundled with app, periodic GitHub update checks; four complete command patterns; cross-platform skill files; no output parsing

Mapped all 9 nodes; clean layered architecture (foundation → terminal → UI); merged node-interaction + multi-node-context into unified Node Interaction; added missing connections for project-launcher; no conflicts found

Architecture review — added 4 new nodes: electron-ipc (blocking), state-management (core), build-distribution (core), testing-strategy (core); cleaned up stale multi-node-context references in connections

Defined full IPC contract: 5 namespaces mirroring modules, standard ipcMain+webContents.send with ArrayBuffer transfer, typed Result<T,E>, Unsubscribe for listeners, main owns parsing and pushes ProjectState with markdownContent, TerminalId for future multi-terminal, MessagePort deferred

Chose Zustand with one store + slices; React Flow owns layout, Zustand owns domain/UI/terminal; diff logic in React hook not store; switchProject as single atomic action with terminal guard; switch blocked while terminal active

Defined confidence bar: unit+integration heavy, E2E minimal (3 scenarios); detailed diff hook test cases including slug rename and rapid sequential updates; file watcher reclassified as integration; terminal xterm rendering as must-E2E

Chose electron-builder, universal Mac binary, SKILL.md manually managed in folder next to app (no runtime updates), no auto-update or code signing for v1; updated skill-orchestration to remove periodic update checks

Chose string[] arg arrays passed directly to node-pty (no shell involved); --append-system-prompt-file for SKILL.md; pure composeCommand function; skills path resolved at startup; Windows shell problem fully eliminated

5-state lifecycle with exited state for output reading; spawn accepts string[] from skill-orchestration; always-visible kill button; modal UI moved out to renderer layer; health check stays in main process
Synced terminal slice to cli-engine's 5-state lifecycle (added exited); switch guard changed to positive whitelist ['idle', 'exited']; switch during exited auto-dismisses terminal modal
Synced to cli-engine's 5-state lifecycle; expanded state-management unit tests with all transitions + positive whitelist guard + auto-dismiss; added natural exit path to terminal integration tests
Two-pattern transport: invoke for request-response (Result<T,E>), send for streaming/push; main-owns-parsing as security boundary; spawn takes string[]; MessagePort deferred
Formalized Electron + TS + React + Vite + Vitest stack; terminal-as-modal is xterm.js overlay div in main BrowserWindow (not separate window), node-pty in main process, data via IPC

Remapped all 12 nodes; fixed cli-engine→file-state-sync direction (depends-on→uses); added 6 missing connections (data-layer→electron-ipc, project-launcher→state-management/electron-ipc, testing-strategy→cli-engine/skill-orchestration/state-management); no conflicts, no merge/split candidates
String splitting with explicit Claude-controlled-format precondition; read-only confirmed; layout in userData; output shape is ProjectState; accepted risk of manual edits breaking parser
React Flow + dagre for auto-layout; maturity as shape+color (4 levels), connections as style+color (5 types); name-only nodes; layout ownership split with state-management; overlay div DOM confirmed

Two-mode interaction (click tooltip + right-click select); context-aware toolbar; Status/Finalize app-native; explicit terminal modal ownership split — renderer owns TerminalModal component, cli-engine owns lifecycle, terminal.status in Zustand bridges
@parcel/watcher + 300ms debounce (pinned from range); full re-read not incremental; watcher lifecycle tied to project; one-directional read-only confirmed
Two-layer (gate + panel); recents max 5 managed by main; init-without-completion: gate→gate, panel→stay; single Open button routes via .ai-arch/ check

Zustand one-store + 3 slices; React Flow ownership split; diff hook in rendering layer; switchProject atomic with positive whitelist guard (new states blocked by default); blocklist rejected as unsafe

electron-builder + GitHub Actions matrix CI; SKILL.md via extraResources only (no runtime updates); resolveSkillsPath() at startup; updating skills = new release; v1 excludes auto-update and code signing

Unit+integration heavy, E2E surgical (3 scenarios); 8 diff hook cases pinned; 5-state + whitelist guard tests; 2-path terminal integration (happy + kill); Vitest + Playwright; mocking boundaries defined
All 12 nodes advanced to ready; 6 feature briefs generated (scaffolding → IPC+data → terminal → state+canvas → interaction+UX → build); todo-list.md created with dependency chain
